scripts:
create service user mysiteServiceUser with path /home/users/system/mysite

set ACL for mysiteServiceUser
    allow jcr:read on /content/mysite
    allow jcr:read on /content/dam/mysite
    allow jcr:read on /conf/mysite
    allow jcr:read on /content/experience-fragments/mysite
    allow jcr:read on /var/workflow/models
end
